creator: dmk@ncf.ca
text:
I've also seen this bug on 8.2-RELEASE-p2 i386. Oddly enough, it compiled 
cleanly on my 8.2-STABLE amd64 box.

root@adminpc5 /usr/ports/multimedia/x264]# make

stable.tar.bz2.
